description_long: This chaise features a robust, angular frame constructed from dark, likely wooden beams, with a geometric, open-sided design. The seat area is broad and flat, covered with a woven or textured material in a muted gray tone, providing a subtle contrast to the black frame. Both sides of the chaise are equipped with armrests, each formed by horizontal and diagonal beams, creating a modern, industrial aesthetic. The backrest is upright and consists of a rectangular frame with a diagonal support, offering structural stability and a distinctive visual element. The legs are thick, straight, and integrated into the frame, giving the piece a sturdy, grounded appearance. The overall design is minimalist yet functional, suitable for urban parks, public spaces, or contemporary outdoor settings.
description: A modern, black-framed chaise with a woven gray seat and geometric armrests, featuring a sturdy, angular design. The piece combines industrial style with functional comfort, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: The chaise is seen from a side angle, highlighting the open, rectangular frame and the full length of the seat with both armrests visible.
description_view_1: This front-facing view emphasizes the upright backrest with its diagonal support and the depth of the seat, showing the solid, blocky legs.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, displaying the geometric armrest structure and the expanse of the seat surface.
description_view_3: The rear view showcases the backrest's rectangular frame and diagonal brace, as well as the symmetrical, sturdy legs.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a rectangular frame with a single diagonal support beam, giving it a modern, geometric look. It is upright, of medium height, and lacks any visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, constructed from horizontal and diagonal beams integrated into the frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are thick, straight, and square, forming a continuous extension of the frame with no decorative elements, finished in a matte black.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The seat features a woven or textured gray fabric with a subtle, uniform pattern, lacking any visible tufting or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, flat seat cushion integrated into the frame, with no additional loose or layered cushions visible.
